'''Munn City''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]]. It was the origin of a<ref name="IBC" /> [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|business/13314_1.html|Currency Upheavals Deliver Profits to IBC}} is set on the date 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] article on profits the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] garnered from their simplification of the process of establishing independent currencies.<ref name="IBC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Munn City was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|website]] issue<ref name="IBC" /> published on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] wrote the site content.<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
